notes: 2026-04-27: Task 10 — Implemented AccessKit adapter wiring in playground.rs. Added Adapter::new init in resumed(), process_event in window_event, update_if_active at end of handler. Zero new deps (accesskit_winit = '0.32' already in Cargo.toml). Implements p2 spool task 'Complete AccessKit integration' from accessibility stream. Branch: repo-assist/improve-accesskit-integration. PR #62 submitted. Task 9 — no new contributors (all PRs are Repo Assist drafts). Task 6 — no human-authored PRs to nudge. Task 11 — Updated Monthly Activity Summary. Next priorities: task_2_fix_prs (2026-04-21), task_8_release (2026-04-20), task_5_maintain_prs/task_7_labels (2026-04-23).

dep_audit_2026_04_26.notes: All deps at same versions as 2026-04-19 audit. No urgent updates needed.

files_changed: crates/motif/examples/playground.rs (added Adapter import, access_adapter field, init in resumed, process_event + update_if_active in window_event)
accesskit_integration_pr_2026_04_27.approach: Adapter::new(&window, initial_tree_fn) in resumed(); process_event(&window, &event) at start of window_event; update_if_active(|| build_tree) at end of window_event. Initial tree: single AccessRole::Window root node. Zero new deps — accesskit_winit already in Cargo.toml.
accesskit_integration_pr_2026_04_27.notes: Implements p2 spool task 'Complete AccessKit integration' from accessibility stream. update_if_active is no-op when no screen reader active. Future work: enrich tree with per-element AccessNodes via DrawContext::with_accessibility; apply same pattern to todomvc.rs.

files_changed: crates/motif_core/src/lib.rs (pub mod animation + pub use animation::*)
animation_primitives_pr_2026_04_26.approach: Animation struct with Instant start + Duration duration. progress() returns 0.0..=1.0 clamped. Easing fns: linear, ease_in (cubic), ease_out (cubic), ease_in_out (cubic). Zero new deps.
animation_primitives_pr_2026_04_26.notes: Implements p3 spool task 'Design animation primitives' from animation stream. TDD: 16 tests covering endpoints, clamp, monotonicity, restart, elapsed/remaining edge cases.

remaining_gaps: IME/marked_range tests (need public set_marked_range() first — now public via PR #59)
